name: @mdz-format/viewer
description: Framework-agnostic <mdz-viewer> web component for rendering MDZ (Markdown Zipped Container) archives. Reads legacy .mdx through 2027-01-01.
comment: private=true until the published package has a real `dist/` build pipeline. Consumers inside this repo import via the source entry (`src/index.ts`); publishing to npm will require a `tsconfig.build.json` with declaration:true + outDir:dist, plus either `vite-plugin-dts` or a separate rollup/tsc step. Tracked in ROADMAP §2.1.
